sentences.arabic: وَجَدَ مَاجِدٌ رَسْمًا عَلَى الرَّمْلِ أَمَامَ الْبَيْتِ.
sentences.translation: Majid je pronašao crtež na pijesku ispred kuće.
sentences.translationEn: Majid found a drawing on the sand in front of the house.

sentences.translation: Crtež je prikazivao veliko sunce i zvijezdu.
sentences.translationEn: The drawing was a big sun and a star.

sentences.translation: Nije znao ko ga je nacrtao.
sentences.translationEn: He did not know who had drawn it.

sentences.arabic: جَاءَ صَدِيقُهُ الصَّغِيرُ وَقَالَ: أَنَا رَسَمْتُهُ لَكَ!
sentences.translation: Došao je njegov mali prijatelj i rekao: Ja sam ga nacrtao za tebe!
sentences.translationEn: His little friend came and said: I drew it for you!

sentences.translation: Majid se nasmiješio i nježno zahvalio prijatelju.
sentences.translationEn: Majid smiled and thanked his friend warmly.
